rulings.Case Title: EST. OF SARE KING WONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Issues may include (but not limited to): 1) No petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report of status of administration has been filed. 2) No final inventory and appraisal has been filed. 3) No bond for personal representative's general appointment is on file. LRSF 14.43. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. ***Until further notice, the Court strongly encourages remote appearances by video or telephone. Counsel and parties may appear by video or audio-only telephone through Zoom. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall. Review the Court's 7th Amended General Order which took effect on 10/30/2020 for more information. If counsel or any party appears in person, he or she should anticipate delays at the entrance to the courthouse and inside the courthouse. Masks must be worn at all times while in the courthouse and social distancing protocols will be strictly enforced, including inside the courtroom. Anyone making an in-person appearance must first familiarize themselves with the Court's current pandemic-related requirements and protocols by reviewing the Court's website at https://sfsuperiorcourt.org/.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LEONARD SIMONETTI POWER OF APPOINTMENT IRREVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Trustee Marwan Nasrah'S Petition For Order To Confirm Ownership Of Assets In The Leonard Simonetti Power Of Appointment Irrevocable Trust
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/28/20. A copy of the petition must be served with the Notice of Hearing. [Probate Code Section 851(a).] A courtesy copy of the corrected Notice of Hearing was not provided to the Examiner. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.93 G.] Petitioner alleges that San Francisco County is the principal place of administration, but he resides in Redwood City. Article Four, Section 1, paragraph d of the original trust states, "After the death of one of us, this agreement shall not be subject to amendment or revocation." Under what authority did Leonard Simonetti execute the Second Amendment to the trust on 12/22/18?
